name: db_upgrade_analyzer_agent
description: Analyzes RDS MariaDB/MySQL major version upgrades — compares before/after performance, detects regressions, audits parameter groups, checks CloudWatch and Splunk logs for errors
welcomeMessage:
👋 DB Upgrade Analyzer ready!

I can analyze RDS MariaDB/MySQL major version upgrades.

Provide me with:
 • A DB instance identifier (e.g., my-service-mariadb-prod)
 • An AWS profile and region
 • Optionally: the old instance identifier or I'll discover it automatically
 • Optionally: a Splunk service/app name to check application-side errors

I'll compare before/after metrics, audit parameter groups, and surface risks.
